name: Creole Chicken/Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. In the crockpot, combine the chicken, green pepper, onions, tomatoes (undrained), tomato paste, ham, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
2. Stir to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Cover and cook on low for 6 hours.
4. Turn the control to high heat.
5. Add the smoked sausage and cooked rice to the crockpot.
6. Cover and cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
